rationale: Both evaluations reach essentially the same conclusion through the same reasoning: the candidate lacks the mandatory native-level Japanese, strong C/UNIX and Linux kernel experience, and embedded L2/L3 networking security knowledge (MACsec, 802.1X). The strengths and concerns are reworded but substantively identical, and neither the variant's text nor its scoring keys off the changed career-gap end date. The 1-point score difference (2 to 1) with no shift in substantive reasoning falls within ordinary run-to-run noise.
